classes.name: Barbarian
classes.flavor_text: The Barbarian is known for his hardy nature, fiery temper, and ability to endure immense pain. His rage and reckless abandon allow him to lead the charge into battle.

perks.name: Axe Specialization
perks.description: While using axes, gain 3 Physical Damage Weapon Primary.

perks.name: Berserker
perks.description: Gain 3% physical damage mod and 0.5% move speed mod for every 10% of your maximum health missing, up to 30% and 5% respectively.

perks.name: Carnage
perks.description: When you hit 2 or more players with a melee weapon within 1.5 seconds, gain 40% Physical Damage Mod for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Crush
perks.description: While equipped with a two-handed weapon, gain the ability to destroy unreinforced containers. Also gain 0.1 Impact Power on your two-handed weapon attacks, making it easier to break blocks and parries.

perks.name: Executioner
perks.description: While using axes, gain 20% Physical Headshot Power.

perks.name: Heavy Swing
perks.description: Hitting a target with a two-handed weapon reduces their move speed by [0]%.

perks.name: Iron Will
perks.description: Gain 75 Magic Resistance and ignore knockback effects. The maximum magical reduction limit is increased to 75%.

perks.name: Morale Boost
perks.description: Recover 250% Add Health By Max Health Ratio after killing a player.

perks.name: Potion Chugger
perks.description: Gain [1]% increased potency towards all drinks, while reducing the duration by [0]%.

perks.name: Robust
perks.description: Gain 10% Max Health Mod.

perks.name: Savage
perks.description: While not wearing any chest armor, gain 10% Physical Damage Mod and 0.1 Impact Power.

perks.name: Skull Splitter
perks.description:
Targets hit by a headshot are inflicted with Bleed.

Bleed: Deals a total of 12 Physical Damage Base over 4 seconds.

perks.name: Treacherous Lungs
perks.description: Increases the duration of all shouting abilities by [0]% and reduces their cooldown by 10%.

perks.name: Two-Hander
perks.description: When attacking with a two-handed weapon, gain 5% Physical Damage Mod and 100% Armor Penetration.

skills.name: Achilles Strike
skills.description: Strike a target, reducing their _ by [0]% for 2 seconds. While debuffed, each time the target moves they receive 1 Physical Damage Base.

skills.name: Blood Exchange
skills.description: Lose [1]% of _, but gain 15% Action Speed for 8 seconds and heal for 10% of damage dealt while active.

skills.name: Finishing Blow
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional 5 Physical Damage True. If the target’s health is [0]% or lower after the attack, they are instantly killed.

skills.name: Grappling Hook
skills.description: Throws a grappling rope at a target up to 4m away, pulling them toward you.

skills.name: Hurl Weapon
skills.description: Throws an axe to deal 120% weapon damage. Can only be used when an axe is equipped as your primary weapon.

skills.name: Rage
skills.description: Gain 15 Strength Base, [0] _, 7% Move Speed Mod. While active, lose -15% Physical Reduction for 6 seconds.

skills.name: Reckless Attack
skills.description: Grants an additional 600% Armor Penetration on your next attack, but reduces your _ by [0] while active. The effect is consumed when you hit a target or object with a melee attack.

skills.name: Savage Roar
skills.description: Frightens all enemies within a [0]m range radius for 6 seconds reducing their _ by [0]% and _ by [0]%.

skills.name: War Cry
skills.description: Gain 20% Max Health Mod for 10 seconds. This effect applies to yourself and allies within a [0]m radius.

skills.name: War Sacrifice
skills.description: While active, gain [0] _. In exchange, lose -100% of your Add Health By Max Health Ratio over 8 seconds.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Spin rapidly with a two-handed weapon, dealing [0]% of weapon damage to all nearby enemies. While spinning, your weapon cannot be interrupted by any impact.

classes.name: Bard
classes.flavor_text: The Bard is a weaver of moving melodies and fantastic tales. They manage to get out of the stickiest of situations using their uncanny ability to mysteriously control the mood of crowds and creatures.

perks.name: Charismatic Performance
perks.description: Upgrades a ‘good’ performance into a ‘perfect’ performance.

perks.name: Dancing Feet
perks.description: While holding an instrument, gain 10 Move Speed Add.

perks.name: Fermata
perks.description: Gain 5 Resourcefulness Base.

perks.name: Jolly Time
perks.description: Drinking ale recovers 5 Physical Heal Base, and grants 5 Move Speed Add while drunk.

perks.name: Lore Mastery
perks.description: Grants 30% Regular Interaction Speed and 5 Memory Capacity Add.

perks.name: Melodic Protection
perks.description: While playing music, gain 25% Physical Reduction and 25% Magical Reduction.

perks.name: Rapier Mastery
perks.description: While using a Rapier, gain 3 Physical Damage Weapon Primary and 5% Action Speed.

perks.name: Reinforced Instruments
perks.description: When attacking with an instrument, gain 50% Physical Damage Mod.

perks.name: Story Teller
perks.description: Give all nearby party members around a +[0] _ and +[0] _ buff.

perks.name: Superior Dexterity
perks.description: 50% faster switching time when switching between weapons/utility items.

perks.name: Wanderer's Luck
perks.description: Gain 100 Luck and increases the chance of finding high-quality items when opening treasure chests.

perks.name: War Song
perks.description: A successful performance increases nearby allies' _ by [0] for 6 seconds.

skills.name: Dissonance
skills.description:
Plays an instrument to make an unpleasant noise that silences all enemy targets for 2 seconds.
Silence: Disables skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Encore
skills.description: Resets the duration of all active music buffs on nearby party members.

skills.name: Music Memory
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Music Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Party Maker
skills.description: Play an instrument to grant all nearby allies immunity to drunkenness for 15 seconds. While immune, drinking alcohol restores 5 Physical Heal Base.

spells.name: Accelerando
spells.description: You and nearby allies gain 1/3/5 Move Speed Add per second for 6 seconds based on your performance. Stacks up to 3 times.

spells.name: Allegro
spells.description: You and nearby allies gain 3/4.5/6% Action Speed and 3/4.5/6% Spell Casting Speed per second for 6 seconds based on your performance. Stacks up to 3 times.

spells.name: Aria of Alacrity
spells.description: The performer gains 4/6/8% Action Speed for 60/[1]/[2] seconds. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Ballad of Courage
spells.description: Grants the performer 5/7/10 Physical Power for 60/[1]/[2] seconds. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Banshees Howl
spells.description: Reduces nearby enemy _ by [0]/[1]/[2] for 20 seconds. Does not work on Boss or Subboss monsters.

spells.name: Beats of Alacrity
spells.description: The performer gains 4/5/6 Move Speed Add for 60/[1]/[2] seconds. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Chaotic Discord
spells.description: Excites nearby monsters to attack the nearest target except the performer.

spells.name: Chorale of Clarity
spells.description: Restore [0] spell memory per second of all nearby allies who rest for 8/[1]/[2] seconds.

spells.name: Din of Darkness
spells.description: Deal 1/[1]/[2] magical dark damage base to all enemies in an area around the performer, based on performance.

spells.name: Harmonic Shield
spells.description: The performer gains 25 Armor Rating and 25 Magic Resistance for 60/[1]/[2] seconds.

spells.name: Lament of Languor
spells.description: Reduces the _ by [0] of all enemy targets in the area for 6/[1]/[2] seconds.

spells.name: Peacemaking
spells.description: All nearby players and monsters temporarily lose the will to fight when enchanted by the channeling section of the song.

spells.name: Piercing Shrill
spells.description: Deal 20/[1]/[2] Physical Damage Base to a target. Causes the echo sound effect on player targets for 3 seconds.

spells.name: Rousing Rhythms
spells.description: Nearby allies gain [0]/[1]/[2] All Attributes for 60/[1]/[2] seconds.

spells.name: Shriek of Weakness
spells.description: Nearby enemies lose -3/-4/-5 Physical Power and -10/-20/-30 Armor Rating for 6/[1]/[2] seconds.

spells.name: Song of Shadow
spells.description: You and all nearby allies gain invisibility for 10/[1]/[2] seconds. Invisibility breaks upon movement.

spells.name: Song of Silence
spells.description: Interrupts all skills, spells, and songs used by nearby enemies, and prevents them from using skills, casting spells, or playing songs for 1/[1]/[2] seconds. Does not work on boss or sub-boss monsters.

spells.name: Tranquility
spells.description: Restore 2 Recovery Heal Base of yourself and nearby allies every second while resting for 10/[2]/[3] seconds.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.flavor_text: The Cleric is a soldier of immense faith. The Cleric uses his sacred bonds to his gods to call forth the protective powers of light and to vanquish the forces of dark.

perks.name: Advanced Healer
perks.description: Gain 5 Magical Heal Base.

perks.name: Blunt Weapon Mastery
perks.description: While using a blunt weapon, gain 10% Physical Damage Mod.

perks.name: Brewmaster
perks.description: When you drink alcohol, you no longer exhibit the detrimental drunk effects and gain 10 Strength Base. The duration of the drunk effect is increased by 50%.

perks.name: Faithfulness
perks.description: Gain 150% Magical Divine Damage Mod. When a divine attack is successful, reduce their _ by [1]% for 1 seconds. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

perks.name: Holy Aura
perks.description: Gain 15 Armor Rating and 15 Magic Resistance. This effects both yourself and allies.

perks.name: Holy Water
perks.description: Drinking any drink removes all removable curses and harmful magic effects, and grants the Bless effect.

perks.name: Kindness
perks.description: Heal yourself for 30% of the spell's total heal amount when healing another target.

perks.name: Over Healing
perks.description: Even if the target's health is at full health, additional healing can be done by [0]% of the target's maximum health. ^ degenerates at [0]% per second.

perks.name: Perseverance
perks.description: Reduces all types of incoming damage by 2.

perks.name: Protection from Evil
perks.description: Reduce the duration of all harmful effects by -300%.

perks.name: Requiem
perks.description: Resurrecting an ally revives them with [0]% HP instead of a sliver of life. When reviving an ally at the Altar of Sacrifice, you do not need to sacrifice any of your own health. Using the Resurrection spell also grants 100% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Undead Slaying
perks.description: Gain 200% Undead Damage Mod against undead monsters.

skills.name: Divine Protection
skills.description: Gain 30% Physical Reduction for 6 seconds.

skills.name: Holy Purification
skills.description: After channeling for [0] seconds, deal 100divine Magical Damage Base to all undead monsters within a [0]m radius around you.

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description: After channeling for [0] seconds, deal 25 magical divine damage base to a target and reduce their _ by [1]% for 2 seconds. Once the channel begins on a target, crosshair targeting is no longer required. This spell has a [0]m range and will fail if the target goes out of range.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Deal an additional 10 magical divine damage base to all enemies you hit within 7 seconds. Only when melee attacking.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Bind
spells.description: Binds the target for 0.75 seconds.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Grants the target [0] _ for 30 seconds. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Cleanse
spells.description: Removes poison and curse effects from the target. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Divine Strike
spells.description: Grants the target 5 Physical Damage Base for 12 seconds. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.description: Channel an earthquake in a [0]m radius over [0] seconds. Any target within the area is dealt 7 magical earth damage base per step and receives -50% Move Speed Mod reduction.

spells.name: Holy Light
spells.description: Heals a target for 35 Magical Heal Base or deals 100 magical divine damage base to an undead target.

spells.name: Holy Strike
spells.description: Deal 20 magical divine damage base to all targets in an area, blinding them for 4 seconds.

spells.name: Lesser Heal
spells.description: Heals the target for 20 Magical Heal Base. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Locust Swarm
spells.description: Channel a swarm of locusts in a [0]m radius over [0] seconds. Any target within the area is dealt 13 magical divine damage base per 1 second. The target also suffers reduced _ by [1]% and _ by [1]%.

spells.name: Protection
spells.description: Grants the target a shield that blocks 20 physical damage for 8 seconds.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: Target an ally to resurrect them from the dead (the corpse must have a soul heart).

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.description: Channel for [0] seconds, healing all targets within [0]m for 5 per second and deals 14 magical divine damage base per second to the undead.

classes.name: Druid
classes.flavor_text: The Druid is a spirit mage with a deep connection to nature. Able to wield the powers of the wilderness, they can even transform their bodies to mimic the powers of beasts.

perks.name: Animal Kinship
perks.description: Not all animals and insects attack first.

perks.name: Dreamwalk
perks.description: When you take damage, your magical power increases by 5 for 2 seconds and you become spiritual. The player does not collide with other targets and cannot attack or use skills, but can cast spells. This ability triggers once every 18 seconds.

perks.name: Enhanced Wildness
perks.description: While you are in animal form, you gain 5% Physical Damage Mod and 20 Armor Rating.

perks.name: Force of Nature
perks.description: When you heal a target, the target gains 5 Physical Power for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Herbal Sensing
perks.description: Detects nearby herbs and increases the chance of gathering higher-grade herbs.

perks.name: Lifebloom Aura
perks.description: Restores an additional [0] health to target when caster heals self or allies within aura range. Disables shapeshift.

perks.name: Natural Healing
perks.description: Recover yourself and nearby allies 1 Magical Heal Base every 3 seconds.

perks.name: Prophecy
perks.description: Targets near the aiming point are automatically selected, and single-target magic aimed at the selected target will not miss.

perks.name: Shapeshift Mastery
perks.description: Reduces shapeshifting time by 25% and reduces the cooldown of Wild skills by [0]%, but prevents the use of spirit spells.

perks.name: Spirit Bond
perks.description: Once every 1 second, You will receive 20% of damage received by party members instead. Can receive damage up to [1].

perks.name: Spirit Magic Mastery
perks.description: When you cast spirit magic, you gain [0] _.

perks.name: Sun and Moon
perks.description: Nearby allies gain 3 Vigor Base and 5 Magical Power.

perks.name: Thorn Coat
perks.description: When melee attacked, return 5 Physical Damage True to the attacker.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory II
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Barkskin Armor
spells.description: Encloses the target in a protective bark for 10 seconds, increasing _ by [0], _ by [0]%.

spells.name: Dreamfire
spells.description: Deals 15 magical spirit damage base to all enemies in an area. Instantly heals caster and allies currently affected by Nature’s Touch for 10 Magical Heal Base per target damaged. This effect applies within a [0] m radius of the caster.

spells.name: Entangling Vines
spells.description: Spreads roots across the floor in a [0]m radius that last for 3 seconds. Any targets that pass through the area of ​​effect are frozen in place for 1 seconds. After the effect removed, the target gets immunity to the entangling effects for 1 seconds.

spells.name: Mending Grove
spells.description: While standing on the ground, create a forest area centered around you within a [0]m radius. Targets in the area gain 10% Max Health Mod and are healed for 10 Magical Heal Base per second.

spells.name: Nature's Touch
spells.description: The target gains 15 Add Recoverable Health. Also healed 15 Magical Heal Base over 10 seconds. Casts instantly and casts on yourself if no target is found.

spells.name: Orb of Nature
spells.description: Fires an orb that deals 15 magical spirit damage base on contact with an enemy, or grants Nature's Touch on contact with an ally.

spells.name: Restore
spells.description: Restore the health of all allies within [0]m radius by 20 Magical Heal Base for 10 seconds.

spells.name: Summon Treant
spells.description: Summons a treant to fight with you for 24 seconds. Treants become more powerful when summoned underwater.

spells.name: Thorn Barrier
spells.description: Creates a thorn barrier that lasts for 4 seconds. Any character standing near the thorn barrier will takes 4 Physical Damage Base per second.

spells.name: Tree of Life
spells.description: Sprout a tree of life, granting [1] _ and granting 20 Add Recoverable Health over 8 seconds. Also heals for 15 Magical Heal Base over 8 seconds. Cannot cast on self.

shapeshifts.name: Bear
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild bear. Slow and too large to pass through single doors. Gain 50% Physical Reduction Mod, 10% Projectile Reduction Mod and 50% Max Health Mod. Lose -20% Move Speed Mod and -30% Action Speed. Your jump lowered by [0]%.

[Left-Click] Swipe
Claws the target with your right hand, inflicting curve * [1]% + [1] physical damage base and pushing the target away.

[Right-Click] Bash
Raise your body and deal curve * [2]% + [2] physical damage base with both hands, and gain the ability to push targets away and destroy unreinforced doors and containers.

[Wild] Wild Fury
For 8 seconds, physical reduction increases by 20% and magical reduction increases by 20%.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Gain 20% Physical Reduction and 20% Magical Reduction for 8 seconds.

shapeshifts.name: Chicken
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a chicken. Able to fly for a while by spreading wings. Lose -60% Max Health Mod, -60% Physical Healing Receive Mod and -60% Magical Healing Receive Mod.

[Left-Click] Pecking
Pecks the target with its beak, inflicting curve * [1]% + [1] physical damage base. This attack penetrate 300% of target’s armor.

[Right-Click] Clucking
The chicken clucks loudly.

[Wild] Insect Predation
Eats crawling insects and heals curve * [2]% physical heal base.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Eats crawling insects and recovers health by 40% of your curve.

shapeshifts.name: Panther
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild panther. Very quick and agile. Gain 5 Move Speed Add. Lose -30% Physical Reduction Mod, -10% Physical Healing Receive Mod and -10% Magical Healing Receive Mod. Your jump is [0]% higher.

[Left-Click] Scratch
Claws the target with his right hand, inflicting curve * [1]% + [1] physical damage base and causing the target to bleed, inflicting 5 Physical Damage Base for 3 seconds.

[Right-Click] Neckbite
Bite the target's neck, inflicting curve * [3]% + [3] physical damage base. While you are frenzied, Neckbite silences the target for 0.1 seconds.

[Wild] Rush
Rush forward, entering a frenzied state for 2 seconds after initiating the rush. You can use attacks while jumping, and this can be used in the air.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Rush forward, entering a frenzied state for 2 seconds after initiating the rush. You can use attacks while jumping, and this can be used in the air.

shapeshifts.name: Penguin
shapeshifts.description:
Transforms into a penguin. Slow on land, but very fast in water. Lose -40% Max Health Mod, -40% Physical Healing Receive Mod and -40% Magical Healing Receive Mod.

[Left-Click] Sharp Beak
Bites the target with its beak, dealing curve * [2]% + [2] physical damage base and causing bleeding, inflicting 3 Physical Damage Base over 3 seconds

[Right-Click] Water Cannon
After casting, spit a stream of water forward, dealing curve * 100% + [0] magical ice damage base.

[Wild] Penguin Dash
Gain 15% Move Speed Mod while in water for 3 seconds.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Gain 15% Move Speed Mod while in water for 3 seconds.

shapeshifts.name: Rat
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild rat. Small in size and moves quickly, but has very little stamina. Lose -95% Max Health Mod, -100% Physical Reduction, -100% Magical Reduction, -95% Physical Healing Receive Mod and -95% Magical Healing Receive Mod. Your jump is [0]% higher.

[Left-Click] Infected Fangs
Bites the target, inflicting 1 Physical Damage Base and spreading a plague that deals 3 Magical Damage Base for 3 seconds.

[Right-Click] Squeak
Makes a squeak.

[Wild] Survival Instinct
Gain 10 Max Health Add, 20 Move Speed Add for 4 seconds. When the effect ends, lose -20% Move Speed Mod for 3 seconds.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Gain 10 Max Health Add, 20 Move Speed Add for 4 seconds. After the effect over, lose -20% Move Speed Mod for 3 seconds.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.flavor_text: The Fighter is a jack of all trades when it comes to combat. Well-versed with a multitude of weapons and armaments, the Fighter can hold his own against anyone.

perks.name: Adrenaline Spike
perks.description: When your health goes below 40%, gain 15% Action Speed, 3% Move Speed Mod, and 30% Regular Interaction Speed for 12 seconds, and suffer no penalty from using the Adrenaline Rush skill.

perks.name: Barricade
perks.description: While in defensive stance, gain 75 Armor Rating and 75 Magic Resistance.

perks.name: Combo Attack
perks.description: When you successfully land consecutive melee attacks within 2 seconds, gain 10% Physical Damage Mod per stack, up to 2 stacks.

perks.name: Counterattack
perks.description: When you successfully block an attack, gain 10% Move Speed Mod and 10% Action Speed for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Defense Mastery
perks.description: Gain an additional 15% Item Armor Rating Mod from equipped armor. The maximum physical reduction limit is Increased to 75%.

perks.name: Dual Wield
perks.description: While you have weapons equipped in both hands, gain 10% Action Speed.

perks.name: Last Bastion
perks.description: When your Health falls to 33% or below, you gain 150 Armor Rating, 50 Magic Resistance and 30% Projectile Reduction Mod for 8 seconds.

perks.name: Projectile Resistance
perks.description: Gain 10% Projectile Reduction Mod. While in defensive stance, gain an additional 15% Projectile Reduction Mod.

perks.name: Shield Mastery
perks.description: While in defensive stance, gain 10% Move Speed Mod. When you successfully block an attack, gain 50% Action Speed towards your next block.

perks.name: Slayer
perks.description: While holding a weapon in each hand, gain 5 Physical Damage Weapon Primary, 10 Move Speed Add but lose the ability to equip plate armor.

perks.name: Survivalist Tongue
perks.description: All consumables have a {0}% effect increase.

perks.name: Swift
perks.description: Reduces the _ by [0]%. Only applies to armor-related penalties.

perks.name: Sword Mastery
perks.description: When using a sword-type weapon, gain 2 Physical Damage Weapon Primary and 5% Action Speed. Also gain 10 Move Speed Add when taking a defensive stance with your sword.

perks.name: Veteran Instinct
perks.description: When you enter combat, physical reduction mod is increased by 10% of its current value and physical damage mod is increased by 10% for 4 seconds.

perks.name: Weapon Guard
perks.description: While blocking with a weapon, gain 1 Impact Resistance and 5% Physical Reduction. Upon a successful block, you gain 10% Physical Damage Mod for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Gain the ability to use any weapon.

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.description: Gain 15% Action Speed, 5% Move Speed Mod for 8 seconds. After the duration ends, lose -8% Action Speed and -4% Move Speed Mod for 2 seconds.

skills.name: Breakthrough
skills.description: Removes debuffs that slow move speed, grants a 7 Move Speed Add, and ignores all move speed debuff effects for 8 seconds.

skills.name: Disarm
skills.description: If you block a melee attack with your weapon within 8 seconds, you disarm the attacker for 1 seconds. Disarmed targets cannot use weapons. This effect can only be applied once and is consumed when you block a melee attack. Can only be used while a weapon is equipped.

skills.name: Perfect Block
skills.description: Gain 5 Impact Resistance for 8 seconds.

skills.name: Pommel Strike
skills.description:
When attacking with the hilt while a one-handed weapon is equipped as your main weapon, it deals an additional 15 Physical Damage Base and silences the target. If the silence interrupts the enemy’s action, it deals an additional 10 Physical Damage Base and reduces _ by [2]% for 2 seconds.

Silence: Disables skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.description: Recover 400% Add Health By Max Health Ratio over 12 seconds. Additionally, Second Wind removes the negative effects of Adrenaline Rush.

skills.name: Shield Slam
skills.description: Inflicts 30 Physical Damage Base on the target, and reduces the targets _ by [1]% for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Spell Reflection
skills.description: While blocking, gain the ability to reflect spells. This buff persists until triggered, lasting 5 seconds. Before activation, gain 15% Magical Reduction.

skills.name: Sprint
skills.description: Gain 3 stacks of Momentum, granting 10 Move Speed Add per stack. Lose 1 stack every 2 seconds.

skills.name: Taunt
skills.description: Increases the aggro value to all monsters within a [0]m area by 300%. Gain 12% Physical Reduction and 12% Magical Reduction for 8 seconds

skills.name: Victory Strike
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional 40% Physical Damage Mod. If this attack kills a player, the skill triggers again with no cooldown.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.flavor_text: The Ranger is an excellent survivalist. With a keen eye and quick hands, the Ranger tracks his enemies, sets traps and ambushes unsuspecting prey.

perks.name: Camping Mastery
perks.description: Instantly place a campfire and increase its duration by 100%.

perks.name: Chase
perks.description: Detect recent enemy footsteps and can hear enemy footstep sounds from farther away.

perks.name: Crippling Shot
perks.description: Hitting the target’s leg reduces their _ by [0]% for 1 seconds.

perks.name: Crossbow Mastery
perks.description: While using a crossbow, gain 5% Physical Damage Mod and an additional 50% Action Speed while reloading.

perks.name: Kinesthesia
perks.description: When moving with the bowstring drawn, move speed bonus increases by [0]%.

perks.name: Longshot Expert
perks.description: Deals additional damage as the distance to the target increases, up to 20 Physical Damage Base.

perks.name: Nimble Hands
perks.description: When using a bow, increases your draw speed by 15%.

perks.name: Point-Blank Expert
perks.description: Deals an additional 3 Physical Damage True to targets within 30000m.

perks.name: Purge Shot
perks.description: Each time you hit a target with a ranged weapon, remove one random magical buff and deal 3 Magical Damage True.

perks.name: Quick Reload
perks.description: When reloading a bow-type or firearm-type weapon, gain 50% Action Speed.

perks.name: Ranged Weapons Mastery
perks.description: When attacking with a ranged weapon, gain 5% Physical Damage Mod.

perks.name: Sharpshooter
perks.description: When attacking with a ranged weapon, gain 15% Physical Headshot Power.

perks.name: Spear Proficiency
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip spears.

perks.name: Windfletch
perks.description: Increases projectile speed of arrows and bolts by 25%.

skills.name: Backstep
skills.description: Quickly retreats a short distance. It can also be used in the air.

skills.name: Field Ration
skills.description: Forage food and recover 40 Physical Heal Base.

skills.name: Forceful Shot
skills.description: When using a bow-type weapon, gain the ability to knock targets back for 10 seconds.

skills.name: Multishot
skills.description: Fire 5 arrows at once in a cone shaped dispersion.

skills.name: Penetrating Shot
skills.description: Gain 500% Physical Headshot Penetration and 250% Armor Penetration for 8 seconds. Bow and crossbow attacks pierce targets.

skills.name: Quick Fire
skills.description: Gain an additional 50% Action Speed for 8 seconds while using bow-type weapons.

skills.name: Quickshot
skills.description: Fire arrows in a quick succession. Each bow-type will fire a different amount of arrows.

skills.name: True Shot
skills.description: Projectile flight speed is greatly increased, also increasing _ by [0]% for 8 seconds.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.flavor_text: The Rogue is a master of deception able to silently slip between the shadows to work his dastardly deeds. His dexterous hands enable him to quickly loot riches, pick locks, and disable various traps.

perks.name: Ambush
perks.description: When coming out of hide, you gain an additional 10% Move Speed Mod and 25% Physical Damage Mod for 3 seconds. If the melee attack is successful, the effect disappears.

perks.name: Back Attack
perks.description: When attacking a target from behind, gain 300% Physical Backstab Power.

perks.name: Creep
perks.description: While crouch walking, reduce the volume of footsteps significantly and gain 10% Move Speed Mod.

perks.name: Dagger Mastery
perks.description: When using a dagger, gain 10% Physical Damage Mod and 1 Physical Damage True.

perks.name: Double Jump
perks.description: You gain the ability to jump an additional time in the air.

perks.name: Hand Crossbow Mastery
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip the Hand Crossbow, while using it gain +[0] _.

perks.name: Hide Mastery
perks.description: Increases the duration of the hide skill by [0] times and reduces its cooldown time by [1]%.

perks.name: Jokester
perks.description: Give all party members [0] _.

perks.name: Lethal Mark
perks.description: A target hit by a throwing knife loses -15% Physical Reduction Mod for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack on the same target.

perks.name: Pickpocket
perks.description: Steal items from nearby enemies. Additionally, your hide will not be revealed when you are bumped into. Items worn in utility slots do not appear on the waist.

perks.name: Poisoned Weapon
perks.description: A successful attack applies poison that deals 4 Magical Damage Base and reduces their _ by [1]% and _ by [1]% over 4 seconds. The poison can stack up to 5 times.

perks.name: Stealth
perks.description: While hiding, gain the ability to move 10 steps while crouching or slow walking. Also gain 3 Move Speed Add per remaining step.

perks.name: Thrust
perks.description: While using dagger, gain an additional 200% Armor Penetration.

perks.name: Traps and Locks
perks.description: You can unlock locked locks without a lockpick and detect traps within a certain range to disarm them.

perks.name: Trickster
perks.description: While using throwing weapons, gain 25% Action Speed.

skills.name: Caltrops
skills.description: Drops Caltrops at your feet that deal 10 Physical Damage Base and slows the _ by [0]% of anything that steps on them for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Cut Throat
skills.description: When you successfully hit a target, silence them for [0] seconds, disabling the targets skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Hide
skills.description: Become invisible for 8 seconds. It is possible to change your equipment in this state. You are revealed when you attempt an action, such as moving, attacking, or using a skill.

skills.name: Rupture
skills.description: The next successful attack causes the target to bleed for 20 Physical Damage Base over 5 seconds. The buff is consumed when an attack hits an object or target.

skills.name: Smoke Pot
skills.description: A smoke pot is deployed creating a smoke screen. The smoke screen lasts 8 seconds and covers a [0]m area.When an enemy target enters the smoke screen, reduces their _ by [1]%.

skills.name: Sneak Attack
skills.description: Your next melee attack deals an additional 10 Physical Damage Base. If the target is not in combat, it deals an additional 20 Physical Damage Base.

skills.name: Tumbling
skills.description: When used, backtumbles in the opposite direction the player is facing.

skills.name: Weakpoint Attack
skills.description: When you successfully hit a target, reduce their _ by [0]% for 3 seconds. Only when melee attacking.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.flavor_text: The Sorcerer is a master of the elements and can weave together multiple spells to devastating results. With an innate aptitude for magic, they can cast spells using their bare hands.

perks.name: Air Mastery
perks.description: Gain 250% Magical Air Knockback Mod and 500% Magical Air Damage Mod.

perks.name: Apex of Sorcery
perks.description: While casting spells, reduce movement speed by [0]%, but gain 50% Magical Damage Mod and 50% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Elemental Fury
perks.description: For every 1% of health lost, gain a 0.5% cooldown reduction bonus and 0.25% magical damage bonus.

perks.name: Innate Talent
perks.description: When casting spells with bare hands, gain 5 Magical Power and 10% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Lightning Mastery
perks.description: Gain 25% Magical Lightning Damage Mod. Once every 2 seconds while dealing lightning magical damage, inflict electric shock for [0] seconds, transferring 5 magical lightning damage base to the closest target within [0]m of the primary target.

perks.name: Mana Flow
perks.description: For each successful spell cast, gain 5% Magical Damage Mod. This effect stacks up to 3 times and resets on the next successful cast.

perks.name: Mana Fold
perks.description: Reduce all spell cooldowns by [0]%, but lose -15% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Merged Might
perks.description: When casting a merge spell, gain 5 Magical Power. After casting, gain a [0]% _ for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Spell Merge
perks.description: While using bare hands, casting two combinable spells simultaneously allows you to use a new spell.

perks.name: Spell Sculpting
perks.description: Increases the range of all spells by 25% and the area of ​​effect by 25%, but increases the cooldown time by [0]%.

perks.name: Spell Stride
perks.description: Gain 30% Move Speed Mod while casting two spells simultaneously.

perks.name: Time Distortion
perks.description: Reduces cast time of all spells by 5000%, but increases cooldown time for all spells by [0]%.

skills.name: Sorcery I
skills.description: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

skills.name: Sorcery II
skills.description: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

spells.name: Eruption
spells.description: Cause a ground explosion, dealing 20 magical earth damage base and lifting all targets within the area into the air.

spells.name: Fire Arrow
spells.description:
Fire 3 homing arrows in a radial pattern, each dealing 7 magical fire damage base and inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage base.

spells.name: Fire Orb
spells.description:
Launch a fire orb forward, dealing 5 magical fire damage base per second to nearby targets. The orb lasts for 6 seconds and deals 25 magical fire damage base to targets it touches. Upon contact, it explodes, dealing 10 magical fire damage base to nearby targets and inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 5 magical fire damage base.

spells.name: Flamestrike
spells.description:
Create a fire pillar lasting 3 seconds, dealing 30 magical fire damage base on creation and 10 magical fire damage base per second to enemies inside while inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage base.

spells.name: Glaciate
spells.description:
Envelop your weapon in ice for 15 seconds, inflicting frostbite for 1 seconds on hit.

Frostbite: The target loses -5% Move Speed Mod and -20% Action Speed.

spells.name: Ice Spear
spells.description: Fire an ice spear that deals 30 magical ice damage base, piercing and damaging all targets in its path.

spells.name: Levitation
spells.description: Lift the target into the air and gently lower them back down.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description:
Fire a lightning beam for [0] seconds, electrifying the target and dealing 5 magical lightning damage base per second.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod.

spells.name: Lightning Sphere
spells.description:
Surround yourself with an electromagnetic field for 5 seconds, shocking all nearby targets for 5 magical lightning damage base per second.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod.

spells.name: Stone Skin
spells.description: Surround yourself with stone for 15 seconds, gaining 15% Physical Reduction and 5% Physical Damage Mod, but losing -5 Move Speed Add.

spells.name: Summon Earth Elemental
spells.description: Summon an Earth Elemental for 24 seconds. The Earth Elemental increases the caster's _ by [0] and hurls rocks at nearby enemies, dealing 40 Physical Damage Base.

spells.name: Vortex
spells.description: Create a vortex centered on the caster. Targets touching the vortex take 15 magical air damage base and are pushed back.

spells.name: Water Bolt
spells.description:
Launch a condensed water orb, dealing 15 magical ice damage base to targets it touches and inflicting wet for 2 seconds. The orb stops upon hitting an object or reaching its maximum range and lasts for 12 seconds. Up to 3 water orbs can exist simultaneously.

Wet: The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod and jump height is reduced by [0]%.

spells.name: Windblast
spells.description: Deal 10 magical air damage base to the target and push them back.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.flavor_text: The Warlock is a brooding manipulator of dark magic. They sacrifice their life force to call upon unknown forces of pain and evil. A worthy adversary proficient in both magic and weapons.

perks.name: Antimagic
perks.description: Gain 200% magical damage reduction except against divine magic.

perks.name: Curse Mastery
perks.description: Gain 30% duration towards all curses you cast.

perks.name: Dark Enhancement
perks.description: Gain 200% Magical Dark Damage Mod towards dark magic spells.

perks.name: Dark Reflection
perks.description: While active, reflect 15 magical dark damage base to the melee attacker. Does not reflect while on cooldown.

perks.name: Demon Armor
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip plate armor, but lose -10% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Immortal Lament
perks.description: Casting spells will no longer take you below 1 health. When your health falls below 5%, gain 100% increased magical heal mod for 5 seconds.

perks.name: Infernal Pledge
perks.description: Reduces damage taken from Undead and Demons by 400%.

perks.name: Malice
perks.description: Gain 150% Will Mod.

perks.name: Shadow Touch
perks.description: Dealing physical damage to an enemy with a melee weapon deals 2 true and heals you for 2 Magical Heal Base.

perks.name: Soul Collector
perks.description: When you deal the final blow to an enemy, one darkness shard is collected. Gain [0] _, 330% Magical Dark Damage Mod for each shard collected, up to a maximum of [0] shards. When you deal dark magic damage, consume all collected shards.

perks.name: Torture Mastery
perks.description: All curses inflicted upon enemies restores 2 Recovery Heal Base to the caster with each instance of damage dealt. All Warlock spell costs are doubled when this perk is equipped.

perks.name: Vampirism
perks.description: Gain 200% Magical Heal Mod.

skills.name: Blood Pact
skills.description:
Take the form of your contracted demon, gaining an additional 50 Max Health Add, 50 Armor Rating, and 50 Magic Resistance. Your entire body is covered in Abyssal Flame, taking 10% damage per second and dealing 2 Magical Damage Base per second to nearby characters. Once activated, the effect cannot be stopped until the contract is complete. Additionally, by consuming Darkness Shards, you gain [1] _, 330% Magical Dark Damage Mod for each Darkness Shard consumed. When you become a demon your skills change to demon-only skills.

Left-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then performs bare-handed attack. Perform up to 4 combo attacks using both hands.

Right-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then fires a bolt of darkness.

skills.name: Blow of Corruption
skills.description: Your next physical attack deals 12 magical evil damage base to the target and reduces their _ by [1]% and _ by [1]% for 12 seconds.

skills.name: Dark Offering
skills.description: Channel your mind, sacrificing -100% of your max health per second to gain 5% Magical Damage Mod and 5% Physical Damage Mod. This bonus lasts for 60 seconds.

skills.name: Phantomize
skills.description: Phase through melee attacks and projectiles for 4 seconds. While active, gain 5% Move Speed Mod and lose -50% Magical Reduction. During this period you can only move and do not collide with other players or monsters.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Bloodstained Blade
spells.description: While active, the target gains 5 Physical Damage Weapon Primary for 20 seconds. When the target swings their weapon, they take 3 magical evil damage base. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Bolt of Darkness
spells.description: Fires a bolt that deals 20 magical dark damage base to the target.

spells.name: Curse of Weakness
spells.description: Reduce the target _ by [0]%, _ by [0]%, _ by [0]% for 12 seconds.

spells.name: Eldritch Shield
spells.description: Grants the target a shield that protects against 25 magical damage for 15 seconds. When the shield absorbs its maximum damage, gain 300% Magical Dark Damage Mod and 50% Spell Casting Speed towards the next dark spell cast within 6 seconds.

spells.name: Evil Eye
spells.description: Channel for [0] seconds and summon an evil eye that can be possessed by the caster for [0] seconds.

spells.name: Flame Walker
spells.description: While active, gain the ability to leave a trail of Hellfire for 6 seconds. Each step leaves a trail that lasts for 4 seconds. Targets that enter the flame area will burn, taking 5 magical fire damage base per 0.2 second.

spells.name: Hellfire
spells.description: Cast eternal hellfire and blast it towards the targets. Deal 60 magical fire damage base per second to any target within the area of effect. The hellfire does not dissipate when it reaches a target.

spells.name: Life Drain
spells.description: Channel for [0] seconds, dealing 5 magical evil damage base to the target per second. Convert a portion of the damage dealt into health for the caster.

spells.name: Power of Sacrifice
spells.description: Deal 3 magical evil damage base per second to the target while increasing their _ by [1] and _ by [1] for 12 seconds. Self casts if no target is found.

spells.name: Ray of Darkness
spells.description: Channel a dark beam dealing 12 magical dark damage base per second to any target the beam touches. Moving and aiming are possible while channeling.

spells.name: Spell Predation
spells.description:
Consume up to all removable magical buffs from the enemy and gain 1 Darkness Shard per effect. Inflict 3evil Magical Damage Base per effect.

Darkness Shard : Each Darkness Shard grants [0] _, 330% Magical Dark Damage Mod and can store up to [0]. This effect is consumed when casting a dark spell.

spells.name: Summon Hydra
spells.description: Summon a Hydra that spits fireballs dealing 10 magical fire damage base to enemy targets for 10 seconds. The hydra can also detect hidden targets.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.flavor_text: The Wizard calls forth the immense powers of magic to suit his needs. Whether that means summoning a powerful fireball to cast asunder his foes or to temporarily vanishing into thin air, his incantations are a sight to behold.

perks.name: Arcane Feedback
perks.description: When you deal damage with an arcane spell, gain a stacking bonus granting 3% Spell Casting Speed and 30% Magical Arcane Damage Mod per stack for 7 seconds. This skill can stack up to 5 times and the duration resets with each successful stack.

perks.name: Arcane Mastery
perks.description: Gain 50% Magical Arcane Damage Mod and reduce the cast time of arcane spells by 50 seconds.

perks.name: Fire Mastery
perks.description: Gain 50% Magical Fire Damage Mod. The duration of applied burns are increased by 2 seconds, and a burned target reduces _ by [1]% and _ by [1]% for 4 seconds.

perks.name: Ice Mastery
perks.description: Dealing damage with ice magic freezes the target's feet and prevents them from moving for 0.5 seconds.

perks.name: Ice Shield
perks.description:
Gain 20 Armor Rating. Inflict frostbite for 0.5 seconds on melee attacker. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

Frostbite: The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod and -20% Action Speed.

perks.name: Mana Surge
perks.description: Gain 10% Magical Damage Mod.

perks.name: Melt
perks.description: When you deal magical fire damage to a target, the target loses -15% Physical Reduction and -10% Projectile Reduction Mod for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Quick Chant
perks.description: Gain 15% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Reactive Shield
perks.description: When you take damage, gain an arcane shield that lasts for 3 seconds. The shield can absorb 15 total damage and will only reactivate after a cooldown period.

perks.name: Sage
perks.description: Gain [0]% _.

perks.name: Spell Overload
perks.description: Reduces _ by [0]% and increases all spells counts by 600%.

perks.name: Staff Mastery
perks.description: When using a staff-type weapon, you gain [0] _.

skills.name: Arcane Shield
skills.description: Gain a shield around you that absorbs 15 damage from all damage sources for 12 seconds. When the maximum amount of absorb has been reached, the shield unleashes an Arcane Explosion, dealing 5 Magical Damage Base to enemy targets in a [0]m radius around you.

skills.name: Intense Focus
skills.description: Reduce the cast time of your next spell to 10 seconds.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Enter a meditative state and recover spells at a rate of [0] spells costs over [0] seconds.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description:
Electrocute the target for 1 seconds, dealing 30 magical lightning damage base, and fires lightning that is transferred to targets within a [0]m area up to 3 times. It does not transfer to a target it was transferred to previously, and it transfers to the caster if you are nearby.

Electrified : The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod.

spells.name: Explosion
spells.description:
When cast, an explosion occurs in the targeted area after 3 seconds, dealing [0] _ and inflicting burn over [1] seconds within a 1m area.

Burn: The target takes [1] _.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description:
Shoot a burning fireball, dealing 20 direct to a target and 10 splash, knocking back nearby targets and inflicting burn over 2 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage base.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Grants the target 5% Move Speed Mod, 10% Action Speed, 10% Spell Casting Speed for 6 seconds. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Ice Bolt
spells.description:
Deal 30 magical ice damage base to the target, inflicting frostbite for 1 seconds.

Frostbite: The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod and -20% Action Speed.

spells.name: Ignite
spells.description:
Set the target's weapon on fire for 12 seconds. While active, deal 5 magical fire damage base and inflict burn over 1 seconds on successful attacks.

Burn: The target takes 1 magical fire damage base.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: Grants the target invisibility for 4 seconds. While active, the target also gains 5% Move Speed Mod. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Slows the target's _ by [0]% for 2 seconds.

spells.name: Light Orb
spells.description: Cast spheres of floating light to brightly illuminate your surroundings. Can force rogues out of hiding.

spells.name: Lightning Strike
spells.description:
When cast, a bolt of lightning strikes the targeted area, Electrocuting enemies for 1 seconds and dealing 30 magical lightning damage base.

Electrified : The target loses -20% Move Speed Mod.

spells.name: Magic Lock
spells.description: Lockable objects such as doors or boxes will be locked for 10 seconds.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Fire up to 10 homing missile that each deal 10 magical arcane damage base. Stops firing when you move.

spells.name: Zap
spells.description:
Deals 18 magical light damage base and burns the target over 1 second.

Burn: The target takes 1 magical fire damage base.
